action.reasoning: Observation: test_inference.py showed model generates descriptive text rather than grounding coordinates when no proper grounding instruction is given. Analysis: we need to understand Qwen2.5-VL's grounding output convention: likely uses <|box_start|><|box_end|> pairs and expects user prompt to include these tokens. Need to inspect added tokens and test with explicit grounding prompt. Decision: write probe_grounding.py to list all special token IDs, test with grounding prompt containing <|box_start|><|box_end|>, and visualize decoded output to identify coordinate format (grid or absolute).
